title: BEM-595 force curator intake
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
decisions=Path('governance/operator_decisions'); decisions.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
inbox=Path('governance/curator/inbox'); inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path=Path('governance/state/decision_curator_handoff_state.json'); state_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

decision_id='bem584_decision_format_live_test'
decision_path=decisions/(decision_id+'.json')
if decision_path.exists():
    try: decision=json.loads(decision_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: decision={}
else:
    decision={'schema_version':'operator_decision.v1','decision_id':decision_id,'source':'forced_recreate','operator_choice':'1','selected_option':'Короткая таблица','question':'Какой формат Telegram-сообщения использовать для решений оператора?','status':'received','handoff_to':'curator','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'}
    decision_path.write_text(json.dumps(decision,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

intake={
  'schema_version':'curator_intake.operator_decision.v1',
  'record_type':'operator_decision_curator_intake',
  'decision_id':decision_id,
  'source_file':str(decision_path),
  'operator_choice':decision.get('operator_choice'),
  'selected_option':decision.get('selected_option'),
  'question':decision.get('question'),
  'handoff_to':'curator',
  'next_route':'internal_contour',
  'status':'ready_for_curator',
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)',
  'decision':decision
}
intake_path=inbox/('operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.json')
intake_path.write_text(json.dumps(intake,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

state={'processed_decisions':[str(decision_path)],'last_run':{'created':[str(intake_path)],'count':1,'status':'completed','blocker':None},'updated_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem595_force_curator_intake_for_decision.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-595 | Force Curator Intake For Decision | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Operator decision was forced into curator inbox without waiting for workflow trigger.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(decision_path)+sep+'- '+str(intake_path)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem595_force_curator_intake_for_decision','cycle_id':'bem595-force-curator-intake-for-decision','source':'gpt','status':'completed','decision_file':str(decision_path),'curator_intake_file':str(intake_path),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state2={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state2=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state2={}
state2['bem595_force_curator_intake_for_decision']={'status':'completed','decision_file':str(decision_path),'curator_intake_file':str(intake_path),'blocker':None}
state2['operator_decision_format']='short_readable_comparison_table'
state2['operator_decision_curator_handoff']='completed'
state2['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'; state2['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state2,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem595_force_curator_intake_for_decision.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-595 PASS: operator decision forced into curator inbox.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(decision_path),str(intake_path),str(state_path),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Forced existing operator decision into curator inbox and marked handoff completed')
"""
No issue comments.
